global_brief: 过去24小时的重要动态主要集中在：I scanned my MCP setup and it scored 0/100. Here's what was wrong.；北大与 DeepSeek 联合开源 DSpark：破解 AI 大模型高并发推理瓶颈，速度提升 60% 至 85%；Your AI agent isn't scraping; it's just failing to read.。
